title: Grilled Sausage with Almond Sauce
description: A classic German dish featuring grilled sausages served with a creamy almond-based sauce. This hearty meal is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Grill the sausages for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add almond milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in creamy cheese until melted and smooth.
Chop almonds and stir them into the sauce.
Serve the grilled sausages with almond sauce spooned over the top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
